hero.thesis: Create short, engaging product videos for DTC brands using just your phone, focusing on high-quality, fast turnaround content.
hero.marketSize: The UGC market for DTC brands is booming, with brands spending an estimated $1 billion in 2023 on video content.
hero.payingEvidence: Brands like Blume, Glossier, and Outdoor Voices are actively seeking UGC content creators on platforms like Instagram and TikTok.

ninetyDay.title: Foundation Setup

actions.action: Research top 20 DTC brands in your niche (e.g., beauty, fitness).
Create a portfolio template in Notion showcasing example video ideas.
Join 3 industry-specific Discord servers (e.g., DTCgrowth, BrandBuilders).

ninetyDay.metric: Engagement in online communities and portfolio completion.

ninetyDay.title: Portfolio Building

actions.action: Film 3 sample 30-second videos using local products.
Edit videos using CapCut with branded elements.
Upload videos to portfolio and share on LinkedIn.

ninetyDay.metric: Number of views and engagement on sample videos.

actions.action: Compile a list of 50 DTC brand contacts from LinkedIn searches.
Send personalized cold emails to 10 brands.
Follow up on emails from earlier this week.

ninetyDay.title: First Deals Closed

actions.action: Negotiate terms with interested brands and secure first deals.
Begin production on first client videos.
Deliver first videos and gather feedback.
actions.success: First client videos delivered with feedback received.

ninetyDay.metric: Number of videos delivered and feedback received.

ninetyDay.title: Refinement and Expansion

actions.action: Refine video editing process based on client feedback.
Reach out to 5 more brands using improved outreach script.
Engage in community discussions to build reputation.

ninetyDay.metric: Improved client satisfaction and process efficiency.

ninetyDay.title: Marketing Your Service

actions.action: Create a landing page with Webflow showcasing your services.
Set up a beehiiv newsletter to collect leads.
Promote your landing page on social media.

ninetyDay.metric: Traffic and sign-ups on landing page.

ninetyDay.title: Systematizing Operations

actions.action: Create a Notion database to track clients and projects.
Automate email follow-ups using ConvertKit.
Review and optimize your workflow for efficiency.

ninetyDay.metric: Efficiency in client communication and project tracking.

ninetyDay.title: Scaling Production

actions.action: Hire a freelance video editor using Lovable.
Develop a style guide to ensure consistent video quality.
Assign editing tasks to your freelancer.

ninetyDay.metric: Increased video output without sacrificing quality.

ninetyDay.title: Advanced Client Acquisition

actions.action: Run a paid ad campaign on Instagram targeting DTC brands.
Analyze ad performance and adjust targeting.
Reach out to previous clients for testimonials.

ninetyDay.metric: New leads generated from ad campaigns.

actions.action: Analyze pricing strategy and adjust for profitability.
Introduce a referral program for existing clients.
Upsell current clients with premium services.
Host a free webinar on UGC creation techniques.
Publish a case study on your most successful project.
Engage with webinar attendees to convert them into clients.

ninetyDay.title: Review and Plan Forward

actions.action: Review financials and calculate monthly MRR.
Plan next quarter's growth strategy based on insights.
Celebrate achievements and plan a reward for your efforts.

ninetyDay.metric: Clarity on growth strategy and financial position.

toolStack.name: Notion
toolStack.why: Organize your portfolio and client projects efficiently.

toolStack.name: CapCut
toolStack.why: Edit videos with high-quality filters and effects easily.

toolStack.name: Webflow
toolStack.why: Create a professional landing page without coding.

toolStack.name: ConvertKit
toolStack.pricing: Free for up to 1,000 subscribers, then $29/month.

toolStack.name: Lovable
toolStack.why: Hire freelancers with ease for video editing tasks.

toolStack.name: beehiiv
toolStack.why: Build and manage a newsletter to attract leads.

firstTenCustomers.script:
Hi [Name],

I specialize in creating captivating 30-second product videos that boost brand engagement and sales. I've worked with [Niche] brands to deliver high-quality, quick-turnaround content. Check out my portfolio [link]. I'd love to discuss how I can help [Brand Name] enhance its online presence. Are you available for a quick call this week?

Best,
[Your Name]
firstTenCustomers.cadence: Send initial email on Monday, follow-up on Thursday.

pricing.starter: $150/video for basic editing and one revision.
pricing.growth: $250/video for advanced editing and two revisions.
pricing.premium: $400/video for custom elements and three revisions.
pricing.raisingRules: Increase prices by 10% every 6 months as demand grows.

failureModes: Ignoring client feedback, resulting in poor quality.
Lack of marketing leading to stagnant growth.
Failing to systematize operations, causing inefficiency.
Not keeping up with video trends, leading to outdated content.

setup.llc: Use Stripe Atlas to form an LLC quickly.
setup.payments: Set up payments through Stan Store for seamless transactions.
setup.contracts: Draft simple service agreements using Notion templates.
setup.insurance: Consider liability insurance for equipment and services.

scaling: To scale your UGC video creation business, start by hiring a freelance video editor to handle the bulk of your editing tasks. This allows you to focus on client acquisition and creative direction. Use tools like Lovable to find reliable freelancers. Next, automate as much of your workflow as possible using tools like ConvertKit for email follow-ups and Notion for project management. As your client base grows, consider forming partnerships with other creators to offer a wider range of services, such as photography or social media management. Finally, invest in quality equipment and software to improve your production quality, and consider hiring a part-time assistant to manage administrative tasks. This will free up your time to focus on strategic growth and client relationships.
